name: deerling
flavor_texts: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.
The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon’s fur. People use it to mark the seasons.
Their coloring changes according to the seasons and can be slightly affected by the temperature and humidity as well.
text: Deerling is the Season Pokémon. It is a normal and grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: chlorophyll, sap-sipper, serene-grace (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 60, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 40, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 75. Evolution line: deerling → sawsbuck. Lore: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass. The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon’s fur. People use it to mark the seasons. Their coloring changes according to the seasons and can be slightly affected by the temperature and humidity as well.
